Class XdsListenerServiceGrpc

java.lang.Object
com.linecorp.centraldogma.xds.listener.v1.XdsListenerServiceGrpc
public final class XdsListenerServiceGrpc extends Object
An XdsListenerService provides methods to manage listeners.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    XdsListenerServiceGrpc.AsyncService
    An XdsListenerService provides methods to manage listeners.
    static final class 
    XdsListenerServiceGrpc.XdsListenerServiceBlockingStub
    A stub to allow clients to do limited synchronous rpc calls to service XdsListenerService.
    static final class 
    XdsListenerServiceGrpc.XdsListenerServiceBlockingV2Stub
    A stub to allow clients to do synchronous rpc calls to service XdsListenerService.
    static final class 
    XdsListenerServiceGrpc.XdsListenerServiceFutureStub
    A stub to allow clients to do ListenableFuture-style rpc calls to service XdsListenerService.
    static class 
    XdsListenerServiceGrpc.XdsListenerServiceImplBase
    Base class for the server implementation of the service XdsListenerService.
    static final class 
    XdsListenerServiceGrpc.XdsListenerServiceStub
    A stub to allow clients to do asynchronous rpc calls to service XdsListenerService.

    static XdsListenerServiceGrpc.XdsListenerServiceBlockingStub
    newBlockingStub(io.grpc.Channel channel)
    Creates a new blocking-style stub that supports unary and streaming output calls on the service
    static XdsListenerServiceGrpc.XdsListenerServiceBlockingV2Stub

    Creates a new blocking-style stub that supports all types of calls on the service

    Creates a new ListenableFuture-style stub that supports unary calls on the service

    Creates a new async stub that supports all call types for the service
